stages.concept:
# Unit 063: to부정사의 형용사적 용법 (명사 수식) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 형용사적 용법**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I need something **to drink**.
> 나는 마실 것이 필요하다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: to부정사가 **명사 뒤에서 명사를 꾸며주는** 것을 형용사적 용법이라고 해요. **'~할, ~하는'**이라는 뜻이에요.

> I have a lot of homework **to do**.
> 나는 해야 할 숙제가 많다.

> She wants a book **to read**.
> 그녀는 읽을 책을 원한다.

> He needs a chair **to sit on**.
> 그는 앉을 의자가 필요하다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 마지막 예문처럼, 명사가 전치사의 목적어가 되는 경우 **전치사를 빼먹으면 안 돼요**!

**Q. 다음 중 형용사적 용법으로 쓰인 to부정사가 포함된 문장을 고르세요.**
1. To read books is fun. (명사적-주어)
2. She wants to be a doctor. (명사적-목적어)
3. Do you have a pen to write with? ✅ (형용사적)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. "쓸 펜(a pen to write with)"처럼 뒤에서 명사를 꾸며주죠!

> I need a pen **to write with**. (펜으로 쓰다)
> 나는 쓸 펜이 필요하다.

> She has no friends **to play with**.
> 그녀는 함께 놀 친구가 없다.

> Give me some paper **to write on**.
> 위에 쓸 종이를 줘.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **-thing, -one, -body** 뒤에 to부정사가 오는 경우도 많아요.

> I want something **to eat**.
> 나는 먹을 것을 원한다.

> Is there anyone **to help** me?
> 나를 도와줄 사람이 있나요?

🧑‍🎓 학생: to부정사가 명사 뒤에서 꾸며주고, 전치사가 필요한 경우 빼먹으면 안 된다는 것도 기억할게요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 063: to부정사의 형용사적 용법 명사 수식 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I have some problems (     ) .
> **정답** to solve

---

**02.** She needs a chair ? .
> **정답** to sit on

---

**03.** He has a lot of work ? .
> **정답** to do

---

**04.** Give me something ? .
> **정답** to drink

---

**05.** I want a friend ? with.
> **정답** to play

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I need something eating.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** eating → to eat

---

**07.** She has no time studying.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** studying → to study

---

**08.** He wants a place sleeping.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sleeping → to sleep

---

**09.** I have some books reading.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** reading → to read

---

**10.** She needs a pen writing with.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** writing → to write

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
마실 것 좀 주세요.
Give me something .
> **정답** to drink

---

**12.** 나에게는 할 일이 많다.
I have a lot of work .
> **정답** to do

---

**13.** 그녀는 살 집이 필요하다.
She needs a house .
> **정답** to live in

---

**14.** 그는 읽을 책을 원한다.
He wants a book .
> **정답** to read

---

**15.** 앉을 의자가 없다.
There is no chair .
> **정답** to sit on

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나에게 먹을 것을 주세요.
Give me something to eat
> **정답** Give / me / something / to / eat

---

**17.** 그녀는 풀어야 할 문제가 많다.
She has many to problems solve
> **정답** She / has / many / problems / to / solve

---

**18.** 나는 같이 놀 친구가 필요하다.
I need a to friend play with
> **정답** I / need / a / friend / to / play / with

---

**19.** 그는 공부할 시간이 없다.
no He has to time study
> **정답** He / has / no / time / to / study

---

**20.** 쓸 펜 좀 빌려주세요.
a to Please lend me pen write with
> **정답** Please / lend / me / a / pen / to / write / with
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 063: to부정사의 형용사적 용법 명사 수식 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Tom has a lot of homework _______________.
But, he has no time _____________ it today.
to doing
to do
doing
do
> **정답** to do

---

**02.** 다음 문장에서 to부정사가 수식하는(꾸미는) 것을
고르시오.
Tom needs some place to
study quietly after school.
> **정답** some place

---

**03.** 다음 문장에서 to부정사가 수식하는(꾸미는) 것을
고르시오.
Amy has much money to
spend on clothes and bags.
> **정답** money

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
She was looking for some food to eat
They promised to write letters to each other.
Amy wanted to read some books about
insects.
Tom hopes to learn about other cultures.
> **정답** She was looking for some food to eat

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Both Amy and Tom want to sleep more on
weekends.
The painter had a lot of pictures to sell.
To solve a problem is his main concern.
Tom's plan was to join the soccer team.
> **정답** The painter had a lot of pictures to sell.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나이 든 여성이 앉을 벤치를 찾고 있다.
An old lady is looking for a bench sitting on.
An old lady is looking for a bench to sit.
An old lady is looking for a bench to sit on.
An old lady is looking for a bench to sitting on.
> **정답** An old lady is looking for a bench to sit on.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 함께 말을 나눌 누군가가 필요하다.
Tom needs someone to talk with.
Tom needs someone talk with.
Tom needs someone to talk.
Tom needs someone talking with him.
> **정답** Tom needs someone to talk with.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
한 학생이 쓸 펜을 빌렸다.
A student borrowed a pen to writing.
A student borrowed a pen to write with.
A student borrowed a pen to write.
A student borrowed a pen writing with.
> **정답** A student borrowed a pen to write with.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
My parents hope to buy a big house to live in.
The office worker's plan was to finish his work
by tomorrow.
Tom wanted to get himself a new pair of
shoes.
I asked her to pass me a sheet of paper.
> **정답** My parents hope to buy a big house to live in.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The couple has two children to take care of.
He ordered a cup of coffee to take out.
This was the last chance to see her.
I need a friend to play.
> **정답** I need a friend to play.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
The artist is ready to draw. So, she needs two things:
a piece of paper to draw ___________, and a
comfortable chair to sit __________.
with
on
for
in
> **정답** on

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
She plans to open a business. So she is looking for
two things;
someone to work _____________ her and others to
prepare ____________ opening.
of
with
on
for
> **정답** for

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
A girl wanted a bigger sofa to sit.
The CEO is looking for a man to work.
I found an old magazine to read.
The kid asked for a toy to play.
> **정답** I found an old magazine to read.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The players found a place to stay with.
The businessman makes a lot of money to
spend.
The worker bought a new laptop to work on.
He has a kid to take care.
> **정답** The worker bought a new laptop to work on., The businessman makes a lot of money to spend.

---

**15.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
Do you have a pencil to
write on?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** on? → with

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
All the students have exams to
prepare.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** prepare. → prepare for

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오.
The guest asked for to drink
something.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to drink something. → something to drink

---

**18.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
독서는 지식을 얻는 최고의 방법이다.
Reading is the best way to getting
knowledge.
> **정답** to get

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Summer holiday is coming. I am going on a trip. It
is the best way to spend a holiday. I
want visiting many museums and art
galleries. During the holiday, I have a lot of time
to enjoy myself. I told my friend
to come with me. But she couldn't,
because she has a baby
to take care .
> **정답** to spend, to visit, to enjoy, to come, to take care of

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고쳐 쓰시오. [1개]
Today, it is time to relax . I won't do
anything today. I just need a chair to sit on and
music to listen .
To go outside is annoying today. I will
just sit here and do nothing for one day.
> **정답** to relax, to listen to, To go
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 063 to부정사의 형용사적 용법 명사 수식중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
정현이는 들을 음악을 켰다. [music, listen to]
Junghyun turned on  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 music, to, listen, to

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Andrew는 그녀에게 할 말이 없었다. [nothing, say]
Andrew had  (     )   (     )   (     )  to her.
정답 nothing, to, say

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 샐러드를 만들 야채를 샀다. [vegetables, make]
We bought some  (     )   (     )   (     )  salad.
정답 vegetables, to, make

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 형용사로 쓰인 to부정사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
I wanted ①to go shopping, because I had some
money ②to spend. I asked my friends ③to come with
me. But they had no time ④to shop. So, I went alone.
I bought a cap. I asked the clerk ⑤to wrap it.
정답 2, 4

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 형용사로 쓰인 to부정사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
Amy likes ① to fly kites. It will be summer soon and
there will be no wind ② to fly kites. So, she went out
with her kite today. It was already hot. The sun
caused her to sweat. She tried ③to fly her kite high,
but she failed. It was not a day ④to have fun.
정답 2, 4

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
chair, sit
A: You look tired. Do you want to sit down?
B: Yes, please. I am tired. I need a  (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 chair, to, sit, on

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
the last, come
A: Who came first in the race? Was it you?
B: No, it was Denny. I was  (     )   (     )  
 in the race.
정답 the, last, to, come

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
friends, play
A: Does Mandy have many friends in school?
B: Yes, she has many  (     )   (     )   (     )  
in school.
정답 friends, to, play, with

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐쓰시오.
I want  (     ) delicious something
[eat] (     ) .
정답 something delicious, to eat

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오. (to
부정사를 사용할 것)
I love [listen] (     )  music. I also like
[play] (     )  music myself. My plan is
[join] (     )  an orchestra next year.
Because I am in the 3rd grade of middle school,
next year will be my last chance
[be] (     )  the member. I will try
[do] (     )  my best.
정답 to listen to, to play, to join, to be, to do

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 063: to부정사의 형용사적 용법 명사 수식 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Tom has a lot of chores _______________.
But, he has no time _____________ them today. to doing to do doing do
> 정답: to do

---

**02.** 다음 문장에서 to부정사가 수식하는(꾸미는) 것을 고르시오.
Jake  needs  some  place  to practice  quietly  after  school.
> 정답: some place

---

**03.** 다음 문장에서 to부정사가 수식하는(꾸미는) 것을 고르시오.
Amy  has  much  time  to spend  on  hobbies  and  sports.
> 정답: time

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
She was looking for some water to drink They promised to write emails to each other.
Tom wanted to read some books about animals.
Amy hopes to learn about other countries.
> 정답: She was looking for some water to drink

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Both Tom and Amy want to sleep more on weekends.
The artist had a lot of paintings to sell.
To solve a puzzle is his main interest.
Jake's plan was to join the basketball team.
> 정답: The artist had a lot of paintings to sell.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
할아버지가 앉을 의자를 찾고 있다.
An old man is looking for a chair sitting on.
An old man is looking for a chair to sit.
An old man is looking for a chair to sit on.
An old man is looking for a chair to sitting on.
> 정답: An old man is looking for a chair to sit on.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
민수는 함께 이야기를 나눌 누군가가 필요하다.
Minsu needs someone to talk with.
Minsu needs someone talk with.
Minsu needs someone to talk.
Minsu needs someone talking with him.
> 정답: Minsu needs someone to talk with.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
한 학생이 쓸 연필을 빌렸다.
A student borrowed a pencil to writing.
A student borrowed a pencil to write with.
A student borrowed a pencil to write.
A student borrowed a pencil writing with.
> 정답: A student borrowed a pencil to write with.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
My parents hope to buy a big house to live in.
The student's plan was to finish his report by tomorrow.
Tom wanted to get himself a new pair of sneakers.
I asked her to pass me a piece of paper.
> 정답: My parents hope to buy a big house to live in.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The family has two pets to take care of.
He ordered a cup of tea to take out.
This was the last chance to meet her.
I need a friend to play.
> 정답: I need a friend to play.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
The student is ready to draw.
So, she needs two things: a piece of paper to draw ___________, and a comfortable desk to sit __________.
with on for at
> 정답: on

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
She plans to start a club.
So she is looking for two things; someone to work _____________ her and others to prepare ____________ the event.
of with on for
> 정답: for

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
A boy wanted a bigger bed to sleep.
The coach is looking for a player to work.
I found an old comic book to read.
The girl asked for a ball to play.
> 정답: I found an old comic book to read.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The hikers found a place to rest with.
The student makes a lot of snacks to share.
The girl bought a new tablet to study on.
He has a puppy to take care.
> 정답: The girl bought a new tablet to study on., The businessman makes a lot of money to spend.

---

**15.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오. Do  you  have  a  pen  to write  on? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: on? → with

---

**16.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오. All  the  students  have  tests  to prepare. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: prepare. → prepare for

---

**17.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐쓰시오. The  visitor  asked  for  to  eat something. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to eat something. → something to eat

---

**18.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
운동은 건강을 유지하는 최고의 방법이다.
Exercise is the best way to keeping healthy.
> 정답: to keep

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Winter break is coming.
I am going on a trip.
It is the best way to spend a holiday.
I want visiting many parks and gardens.
During the break, I have a lot of time to enjoy myself.
I told my friend to come with me.
But she couldn't, because she has a baby to take care .
> 정답: to spend, to visit, to enjoy, to come, to take care of

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 고쳐 쓰시오. [1개]
Today, it is time to relax .
I won't do anything today.
I just need a sofa to sit on and a podcast to listen .
To go outside is tiring today.
I will just sit here and do nothing for one day.
> 정답: to relax, to listen to, To go
